{{Infobox character
| name = Dead Mother
| aliases = The Dead Mother
| species = Great elder
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|remake bodies}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|, draws people toward it, destroys bodies and builds them anew}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|, stitch someone back together}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Nakothi]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|cults}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi's island]]}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|Of Sea and Shadow]]
}}

''See also: [[Dead Mother Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Dead Mother, also known as [[Nakothi]], is a fallen [[Elder]] whose massive corpse forms the basis of a strange and vast [[island]] in the [[Aion Sea]]. Her death was caused by her defeat at the hands of [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] and the [[Estyr Six]], an event characterized by violent death throes that shattered the surrounding landscape. Even in death, her influence remains immense; her body continues to heave and break mountains, and her presence can be felt as a cold, blazing power. She is known to possess multiple hearts, which are highly sought after by various factions, including the [[Regents]] and the [[Blackwatch]]. These hearts hold immense power, capable of providing hidden knowledge regarding [[life]] and death or even potentially resurrecting the fallen. The Dead Mother exerts a constant, whispering influence over the living, often attempting to manipulate humans into dying so she can reshape them into horrific monstrosities. She has created various servants, such as [[Handmaidens]] and the [[Children of the Dead Mother]]. The latter are specialized workers or monsters formed when [[Nakothi]]'s power infuses human remains, resulting in creatures made of pale flesh and bone. While some individuals have made bargains to use her power, there is a constant risk that she will eventually rise and exert total authority over them. Her legacy continues to shape the world through her lingering voice, her terrifying creations, and the ongoing conflicts over her remains.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The influence of the Dead Mother expanded until it ultimately resulted in the death of [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]. This entity possesses the power to remake physical bodies and is linked to the thoughts associated with the [[Heart]] through a similar signature. After the [[Heart of Nakothi]] was pried from her body, she produced various spawn. Following her death, the [[island]] situated above her corpse began to shake.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Dead Mother]]'s influence grew to the point that [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] was killed.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The thoughts associated with the [[Heart]] have a signature similar to the [[Dead Mother]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Dead Mother]] is a power that can remake bodies.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] was pried out of the [[Dead Mother]]'s body.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Dead Mother]] has spawn.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[island]] over the [[Dead Mother]]’s corpse is shaking.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Once possessing eleven other hearts, the Dead Mother is a gargantuan entity whose massive body constitutes the [[island]] of [[Nakothi]]. Though she currently sleeps, her eternal whispering voice is linked to the [[Heart]] and seeks to convince humans to die so she may rebuild their destroyed bodies into monstrosities. This power draws people toward her, and even a prisoner has been known to swear by her name. While the Luminians once exterminated her cults, she remains a looming presence that can be woken by the release of the [[Heart]]'s power. Her influence is felt through the screams from out on the [[Aion]] and the corruption she exerts upon others.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">15</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Dead Mother]] once had many hearts.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The prisoner swore by [[Dead Mother]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Dead Mother]] is a gargantuan entity whose body forms [[Nakothi's island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]]'s blade reminds her of the [[Dead Mother]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] wants to clear the [[Dead Mother]] out of her [[life]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Dead Mother]] is a power that draws people toward it.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Dead Mother]] could be woken by the release of the [[Heart]]'s power.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Dead Mother]] had cults that were exterminated by the Luminians.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Dead Mother]]'s voice is associated with the [[Heart]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Dead Mother]]'s voice whispers eternally and tries to convince humans to die so she can remake them into a monstrosity.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Dead Mother]] destroys bodies and builds them anew.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Dead Mother]] once had eleven other hearts.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c20">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Dead Mother]] is currently sleeping.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Dead Mother]] screamed from out on the [[Aion]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Someone believes they are being corrupted by the [[Dead Mother]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c27">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Dead Mother]] possesses power that [[Kelarac]] could use.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c22">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|After [[Syphren]] stabbed the [[Dead Mother's heart]], [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] established a contingency plan to address her status as a potential threat. Known as [[Nakothi]], this being possesses the ability to create servants and exerts a lingering influence over others. Her victory is tied to the death of a human soul, and she remains a danger capable of taking over [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s body. Should [[Nakothi]]'s [[Heart]] not be separated from him, her power could bring [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] back to [[life]], risking his total possession by her. Furthermore, she is an entity that can be identified by a distinct scent.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">10</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Syphren]] has stabbed the [[Dead Mother's heart]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Dead Mother]] is a potential threat that [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] has a contingency plan for.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The influence of the [[Dead Mother]] is mentioned.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Dead Mother]] is a figure whose victory would occur if the human's soul died.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c9">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Dead Mother]] is a being capable of creating servants.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Dead Mother]] is [[Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Dead Mother]] is a potential entity that could take over [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c12">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Dead Mother]]'s power can bring [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] back to [[life]] if [[Nakothi]]'s [[Heart]] is not separated from him.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Emperor]] risks handing over his body to the [[Dead Mother]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Dead Mother]] is something a person can smell like.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Dead Mother]] is an entity that could potentially stitch someone back together.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Dead Mother]] is a giant corpse walking.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Dead Mother]]'s proximity makes her [[Children]] more powerful.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Dead Mother]] is a being [[Shera]] focuses on.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“As I believe the Emperor taught you, the Dead Mother once had many hearts.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“I’m not even sure what that would mean,” Shera said, ignoring the Dead Mother’s voice.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“He thinks he’s being corrupted by the Dead Mother.”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c27" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|“It’s only a precaution, in case the Dead Mother takes over. We’re his…contingency plan.”<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Great Elders]]
